title: leptorkis glossula
intro: Leptorkis glossula, also known as the Indian orchid tree or snake skin orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asclepiadaceae. The plant is known for its unique appearance and is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani systems, for its medicinal properties. Leptorkis glossula is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Leptorkis glossula include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are often used to promote overall health and well-being, as well as to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats.
